form.formComment: Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, sat on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 7 at Doomben Cg&E Mdn-Sw on February 25 over 1200m, 6 len behind Black Assassin carrying 58kg at $4.40. Second-up 8th of 11 at Ipswich Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Raging with 58.5kg at $13. Better than the last run suggests.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Harry Richardson trained three-year-old gelding lining up for debut. Half-brother to 10-time winner Jerry Zanda. Won a recent Toowoomba Inner Track trial. Good draw will assist chances. Trial winner who should be very competitive.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Harry Richardson trained three-year-old gelding lining up for debut. Half-brother to 10-time winner Jerry Zanda. Won a recent Toowoomba Inner Track trial. Good draw will assist chances. Trial winner who should be very competitive.

form.formComment: Gelding by Castelvecchio on debut. Half-brother to three-time winner and Group 2 performed Blue Lagoon. Dam was unraced. Ran 3rd in a Warwick trial over 800m on March 24. Monitor market moves.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when second last of 12 at Gatton Mdn-Sw on January 9 over 1100m, 13 len behind Solar Surfer with 57kg at $10. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation seventh of 11 at Toowoomba Mdn October 6 over 1200m, 6 len behind Gerry's Pick with 59.5kg at $101. On debut ran last of 9 at Toowoomba Mdn August 30 over 1100m, 7 len behind Decorative with 60kg at $21. Might need this hit-out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began very awkwardly, shifted out and bumped.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months eased back early on 7th of 10 at Gold Coast Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1000m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Galavino with 56.5kg at $26. Previously second-up 5th of 12 at Gundagai Super Mdn on September 7 over 1180m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Drumcondra with 57kg at $3.80. Can do much better this time with the run under his belt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Re-saddled behind the barriers. For a short distance passing the 800m laid in.
Began only fairly. Passing the 150m, briefly held up.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 4th of 9 at Gold Coast Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1000m, slow going 5.5 len behind Ciphertext carrying 58.5kg at $10. Previously second-up 5th of 12 at Gatton Mdn-Sw on September 25 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Chilpur with 58.5kg at $1.55. Fitter and looks set to improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running on entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of eight months. Finished off last campaign sixth of 11 at Ipswich Mdn-Sw August 14 over 1200m, 5 len behind Smart Shazza carrying 57kg at $26. First up last campaign sixth of 12 at Sunshine Coast Mdn August 3 over 1000m, soft track; 8 len behind Podium Star with 57.5kg at $16. Expect he will go well while fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced in restricted room approaching the 200m when Potenco shifted out.

form.formComment: Last start tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 1200m, slow going 0.9 len behind Sir Memphis with 58.5kg at $7. The run before that raced behind the speed prior to fading 8th of 12 at Beaudesert 4yo+ Mdn on February 6 over 1400m, 13 len behind Effie's Joy with 55.5kg at $16. One of the chief contenders.

form.formComment: Comes off a 59 day let-up. Last start failed to make an impression; 5th of 7 at Doomben 4yo+ Mdn-Sw on February 11 over 1650m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Abraham carrying 55.5kg at $31. The start before that raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 9 at Murwillumbah Mdn-Sw on February 1 over 1550m, 1.0 len behind Puligny carrying 59kg at $5.50. Well placed to improve.
